full_text:
Gu Pu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gu Puwas born in Guanghan. Composed a hymn and a noted scholar. Embarrassed his superior Xiahou Zuan in front of Qin Mi. Gu Pu was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
